violations.text: The hand sinks in the staff, men's, and women's restroom were lacking proper signage reminding employees to wash their hands prior to returning to work. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2025

The drains for the 3-bay sink in the main kitchen ware washing area were observed leaking and are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2025
